mapper.select: SELECT domain_keyword_id AS domainKeywordId, domain_keyword AS domainKeyword, domain_keyword_description AS domainKeywordDescription, CASE WHEN domain_competency_category = 'OTHERS' THEN 'OTHER' ELSE domain_competency_category END AS domainCompetencyCategory, domain_base_score AS domainBaseScore, domain_weight AS domainWeight, domain_is_active AS domainIsActive FROM domain_keyword WHERE domain_keyword_id = #{domainKeywordId}
